message:
chore: gitignore remaining beads advisory locks + last-touched marker

The previous entry only covered `.beads/.bv.lock` explicitly, leaving
two runtime state files uncovered:

- `.beads/*.lock` — broader catch that also handles `.beads/.write.lock`
  and `.beads/.sync.lock`, the other advisory flocks the `br` CLI
  writes on every invocation.
- `.beads/last-touched` — the single-byte marker beads writes on every
  sync so downstream tools (`bv`) can notice when the issue store
  changed.

Both regularly appear in `git status` after any agent session that
exercises the beads CLI. Matches the canonical entries in aadc,
beads_rust, and frankensqlite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 .beads/.bv.lock
+.beads/*.lock
+.beads/last-touched
 
 # Build artifacts
 /target/
